title: BioInsight: Multi-Agent Orchestration for Interactive Biomedical Knowledge Discovery
innovation_summary: BioInsight: Multi-Agent Orchestration for Interactive Biomedical Knowledge Discovery: We present BioInsight, a multi-agent system that moves from static biomedical report generation to interactive evidence-centered interactive interface generation.
